title: Primary Biliary Cholangitis (PBC)
subtitle: Understanding and managing primary biliary cholangitis
description: Clear, evidence-based information about primary biliary cholangitis (PBC) — symptoms, treatment with ursodiol, monitoring, and when to seek help. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.

EASL Clinical Practice Guidelines on Primary Biliary Cholangitis
BSG/UK-PBC Guidelines for the Management of Primary Biliary Cholangitis
